name: Bluestone Resources Inc.
description: Bluestone Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the advancement of its 100%-owned Cerro Blanco gold project and Mita geothermal project located in southern Guatemala. The Cerro Blanco gold project is an advanced-stage, high-grade gold project. Bluestone is committed to responsible development, adhering to high environmental, social, and safety standards while creating sustainable value for its stakeholders.
